name: scrape-group-members
title: WhatsApp group → contacts
description: Export every member of a WhatsApp group — names and numbers, any group size — into a CSV you keep locally. Deterministic, no LLM.
_needs: INGREDIENTS (you pass at cook time, never stored here): group = the group's exact name. KEY (you provide once, inside Loop — never in this file): a logged-in web.whatsapp.com session. This file is the METHOD only — fully generic and safe to share. Cook it: loop run scrape-group-members group="Your Group".

steps.target: Search or start a new chat
